name: The Bank of Nagoya, Ltd.
summary: The Bank of Nagoya, Ltd. provides various banking products and financial services in Japan. The company operates through Banking, Leasing, and Credit Card segments. It offers deposits and loans; domestic and foreign exchange transactions; securities investments; trading of trading account securities; and underwriting and registration of corporate bonds. The company also engages in finance leasing, credit card, and clerical outsourcing businesses. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 113 branches. The Bank of Nagoya, Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is based in Nagoya, Japan.
